data.title: Tether’s $500B valuation would make its chairman Devasini richer than Warren Buffett
data.description:
Tether is looking for a deal that would push its valuation to $500 billion, and if that happens, Giancarlo Devasini would end up with a net worth of $224 billion, putting him ahead of Warren Buffett, right behind Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, Larry Ellison, and Mark Zuckerberg. This info came from the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tethers-chairman-richer-than-warren-buffett/

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried’s ‘gm’ Sparks FTT Rally as FTX Prepares $1.6B Repayment
data.description:
Sam Bankman-Fried's casual greeting of 'gm' has ignited a significant rally in the price of FTT, the native token of the FTX exchange, as the company gears up to make a substantial repayment of $1.6 billion to its creditors. This unexpected uptick in FTT's value reflects renewed investor interest and optimism surrounding the future of FTX, particularly in light of its ongoing efforts to settle outstanding debts and stabilize its operations following recent financial challenges.
source: https://blocknews.com/sam-bankman-frieds-gm-sparks-ftt-rally-as-ftx-prepares-1-6b-repayment/

data.title: Why Shiba Inu Price Could Explode 100% With This Descending Pattern On The 2D Chart
data.description:
Shiba Inu has spent the past several days trading in a downward path after a failed breakout attempt above $0. 000015 earlier this month. Despite the cautious sentiment among investors, Shiba Inu’s chart structure on the 2-day candlestick timeframe is pointing to an interesting structure. Related Reading: Shiba Inu Completes Bullish Setup: Why A 138% Climb Could Be In The Works A technical analysis by crypto analyst Jonathan Carter highlights a descending triangle formation that could set the stage for a strong bullish move
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/shiba-inu/shiba-inu-could-explode-100/

data.title: Sen. Warren accuses Rolex of courting Trump to dodge tariffs, cites Apple and Nvidia playbook
data.description:
Senator Elizabeth Warren just dropped a grenade on Rolex. On Wednesday, she sent a letter to CEO Jean-Frederic Dufour calling out the Swiss watchmaker for hosting President Donald Trump at their midcourt box during the U. S. Open. The invite, she said, looks like a play to wiggle out of the 39% tariff Trump slapped on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sen-warren-rolex-courting-trump-tariffs/
